props.ChoiceText: You were made useful long before anyone cared whether the work suited you.
props.ChoiceBio: Menial service taught you obedience, utility, and how little choice accompanies some beginnings.

0.TransitionText: Because menial service taught you obedience, utility, and how little choice accompanies some beginnings, training gave way to burden, wages, and exhausting necessity.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Laborer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because menial service taught you obedience, utility, and how little choice accompanies some beginnings, your labor remained bound to earth, weather, and the plain demands of survival.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Farmer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TransitionText: Because menial service taught you obedience, utility, and how little choice accompanies some beginnings, your apprenticeship opened into a different trade of life.
